summary: Iteration 6 testing: CSV import (7347 products) + product visibility toggle. Backend 15/15 tests pass. Frontend was completely broken on first run due to stale imports of deleted ../mock module in 3 pages — fixed (mechanical removal) and frontend now fully working: admin panel pagination shows 'Page 1 / 147', VISIBILITY column with working toggle, public /products correctly filters hidden items.

ui_bugs.issue: BLOCKING: Imported from deleted ../mock module causing 'Cannot find module ../mock' runtime error on every page load. Whole frontend was dead. Fixed by removing the mock imports and mock fallback code paths.
Header reads 'Discover our curated collection of 200 luxury products' (using current page length). Should reflect total (7347) or filtered total from API response 'total' field.
Top nav exposes MAKEUP and BODY CARE categories, but CSV import contains only HAIRCARE, MEN'S CARE, PERFUMES, SKINCARE, Other. Clicking MAKEUP/BODY CARE yields empty results.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 401 errors (likely from /api/auth/me or /api/cart polled when not logged in). Non-blocking but noisy. Wrap calls or suppress when no token.

action_items: Review the 3 files I patched (Home.jsx, ProductDetail.jsx, CheckoutSuccess.jsx) — I removed mock fallbacks mechanically. Ensure this matches the desired behavior (the iteration request stated mock fallback was to be removed).
Reconcile navbar category links with actual CSV categories (remove MAKEUP / BODY CARE, or update CSV/import to map products into them).
Update Products.jsx subtitle to show real total from API response (currently shows current page count, not 7347).
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/products/{id}/visibility correctly validates admin role and toggles is_visible with persistence.
GET /api/products correctly applies {is_active:true, is_visible:true} so hidden products never leak to anonymous users.
GET /api/products/admin/all gates by admin role and returns hidden products with is_visible field for UI toggle.
Pagination math is correct: 7347 / 50 = 147 pages exact in admin panel.
Backend imports from emergentintegrations & uses ObjectId — ObjectId is converted to str in product_doc_to_response. Good.

BUG (main agent oversight): the request said 'previous mock.js file has been deleted' but only Products.jsx mock fallback was cleaned. Home.jsx / ProductDetail.jsx / CheckoutSuccess.jsx still imported it, fully crashing the SPA. This should have been caught before iteration finish.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/CheckoutSuccess.jsx (removed mock import; added inline clearCart that uses localStorage)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of in-scope flows after the mock-import fix

context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV import + visibility toggle feature fully verified. 7347 products in DB. Admin panel pagination shows 147 pages of 50. Toggle visibility flips is_visible and instantly removes/adds product from public /products list. NOTE: tester had to remove dead ../mock imports from Home.jsx, ProductDetail.jsx, CheckoutSuccess.jsx because main agent forgot to clean them up after deleting mock.js. Main agent should review those edits.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Whole frontend showed 'Cannot find module ../mock' runtime error overlay; site unusable.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Open any route on the deployed frontend.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Main agent removed /app/frontend/src/mock.js for security but did not update all importers. Static imports `import { products as mockProducts, categories as mockCategories } from '../mock'` in Home.jsx, ProductDetail.jsx, and CheckoutSuccess.jsx broke the webpack bundle.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation_applied: Removed mock imports and the mock fallback branches in those 3 files. For CheckoutSuccess.jsx, the only mock dep was clearCart() — replaced with inline localStorage.removeItem('cart').
